title: Not Dirt Dimension
description: Adds a dimension not made of dirt
body: This mod a new block called "Not Dirt", which can rarely be found underground. And when arranged into a portal and lit it allows you to travel to the Not Dirt Dimension. This dimension is filled with absurd biomes and most importantly Living Not Dirt Blocks, these blocks are both numerous and deadly. When killed they have a chance to drop a Living Not Dirt Block Soul. These are used to upgrade diamond armor into Living Not Dirt Block Soul Armor, an alternative to Netherite
